dir_id.description: 20‑digit identifier allocated from the global ID allocator

allocated_at_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the directory ID was allocated

allocator_version.description: Version of the allocator implementation used to issue the ID

project_root_id.description: Stable identifier of the project root at allocation time

relative_path.description: Relative path of the directory within the project root at allocation time

notes.description: Optional human notes about this directory allocation
